name: read_presentation
description: Read a Google Slides presentation by its presentation_id. Returns the deck's title plus a structured list of slides — each slide's objectId and its pageElements (each element's objectId, type, and any text) — so you can discover what to target before editing with slides_batch_update.

presentation_id.description: The Google Slides presentation ID (from create_presentation or a docs.google.com/presentation URL).

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON {presentation_id, title, slides: [{object_id, page_elements: [{object_id, type, text?}]}]} (or an error string).
notes: Call read_presentation first to get the slide object_ids and pageElement object_ids; those are what slides_batch_update requests reference (e.g. insertText targets a shape's object_id).
